posts.author: Gregory
posts.content:
@Mazeflare it's not in the works anytime soon. When it happens I'm not sure what the approach would be. I think the standard approach is to receive a signal from your own browser / computer. If your computer thinks it's dark mode time, your browser recognizes that and uses the dark mode styles on a given website, if they are available. In the case of Tapology there are no dark mode styles available so nothing currently happens.

If you don't like dark mode on ANY website it probably is as simple as changing your dark mode / night time settings on your device. Then it will never turn on for any website.

posts.author: Gregory
posts.content:
For anyone desperately wanting dark mode on Tapology now, a user made a style hack here:
https://www.tapology.com/forum/threads/80215

This is not an official Tapology thing so no guarantee it's going to work well.
